rules.intent: If course does not exist in course catalog, block auto-write and mark invalid course.

outcome.suggested_admin_action: Requested course is not configured. Ask student to select a valid course and resubmit.
outcome.reason: Rulebook: requested course does not exist in configured catalog.

examples: Course=CSC401 but catalog has only Group 1..Group 14.

rules.intent: If course exists but is not active, block auto-write and require review.

outcome.suggested_admin_action: Requested course is not active for this session. Verify schedule before attendance write.
outcome.reason: Rulebook: requested course is not currently active.

rules.intent: Missing fingerprint/IP should block auto-write because linkage is incomplete.

outcome.suggested_admin_action: Fingerprint/IP missing. Require manual verification before attendance write.
outcome.reason: Rulebook: missing fingerprint or IP for policy-safe auto-write.

examples: Support ticket has empty fingerprint or unknown IP.

rules.intent: If fingerprint appears tied to another matric same day/course, treat as rig attempt.

outcome.suggested_admin_action: Fingerprint conflict detected across matrics for same course/day. Block auto-write and verify identity manually.
outcome.reason: Rulebook: fingerprint overlap indicates possible rig/proxy attempt.

examples: Same fingerprint used by two matrics in one course on same date.
